summary: Iteration 44 - Automated Distributor Report Scheduler & Bulk Reconciliation Testing. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly. Schedule CRUD operations (create, list, toggle, delete) working. Bulk reconciliation actions (resolve duplicates, bulk assign) working with proper validation.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <option> - cosmetic hydration warning, does not affect functionality
Console warnings about chart dimensions when page first loads - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (same as previous iterations)

Backend: POST /api/admin/schedules creates weekly schedule with correct fields
Backend: POST /api/admin/schedules creates monthly schedule
Backend: POST /api/admin/schedules rejects invalid frequency (400)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/schedules/{id}/toggle pauses active schedule
Backend: PUT /api/admin/schedules/{id}/toggle resumes paused schedule
Backend: PUT /api/admin/schedules/{id}/toggle returns 404 for nonexistent schedule
Backend: POST /api/admin/schedules/check-due processes overdue schedules and returns reminders_sent count
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/schedules/{id} deletes schedule
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/schedules/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent schedule
Backend: GET /api/admin/royalties/reconciliation returns summary, duplicates, discrepancies
Backend: POST resolve-duplicates requires at least 2 entry IDs (400)
Backend: POST resolve-duplicates rejects empty entry_ids (400)
Backend: POST resolve-duplicates rejects invalid strategy (400)
Backend: POST resolve-duplicates accepts valid strategies (keep_latest, keep_highest, delete_all)
Backend: POST bulk-assign rejects empty entry_ids (400)
Backend: POST bulk-assign returns 404 for invalid artist_id
Backend: POST bulk-assign works with valid artist_id

Backend: GET /api/admin/distributor-templates returns templates (regression)
Backend: GET /api/admin/royalties/imports returns imports (regression)

Frontend: Admin Royalty Import page loads with 4 tabs (Import & Upload, Distributor Templates, Reconciliation, Schedules)

Frontend: Schedules section shows Import Schedules header
Frontend: New Schedule button visible with data-testid='new-schedule-btn'
Frontend: Check Due button visible with data-testid='check-due-btn'
Frontend: New Schedule form opens with all fields (name, frequency, template, artist, notes)
Frontend: Schedule creation works - form closes and schedule appears in list
Frontend: Schedule toggle works - status changes between active/paused
Frontend: Toast notifications appear for schedule actions
Frontend: Reconciliation tab shows summary cards (Total Imports, Total Entries, Duplicate Groups, Discrepancies)

critical_code_review_comments: Schedule CRUD endpoints properly validate frequency (only weekly/monthly allowed)
Schedule toggle correctly recalculates next_due when resuming from paused state
Check-due endpoint creates reminder notifications and advances next_due date
Bulk resolve-duplicates validates minimum 2 entry IDs and valid strategy
Bulk assign validates artist_id exists before assigning entries
Bulk assign creates notification for artist when entries are assigned
All data-testid attributes present for testing (admin-tab-schedules, new-schedule-btn, check-due-btn, bulk-resolve-bar, resolve-all-btn, bulk-assign-section, etc.)
Schedules list shows overdue flag for active schedules past their next_due date
seed_data_creation: Created test schedules during testing (Test Schedule from Playwright, Test Weekly Schedule, Test Monthly Schedule). Existing schedule 'Weekly CD Baby Import' was present from previous testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 tested the new Scheduler and Bulk Reconciliation features. The Admin Royalty Import page at /admin/royalty-import now has 4 tabs: Import & Upload, Distributor Templates, Reconciliation, and Schedules. The Schedules tab allows creating weekly/monthly import schedules with optional template and artist assignment. The Check Due button triggers /api/admin/schedules/check-due which creates reminder notifications for overdue schedules. The Reconciliation tab has a Bulk Resolve toolbar with strategy dropdown (keep_latest, keep_highest, delete_all) and Resolve All Duplicates button. There's also a Bulk Assign Unmatched section at the bottom for assigning unmatched entries to an artist. All CRUD operations for schedules work correctly. The admin user has 34 imports, 83 entries, 19 duplicate groups, and 8 unmatched entries.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

schedule_crud.create: POST /api/admin/schedules - Creates schedule with name, frequency, template_id, artist_id, notes
schedule_crud.list: GET /api/admin/schedules - Returns schedules with overdue flag
schedule_crud.check_due: POST /api/admin/schedules/check-due - Processes overdue schedules, sends reminders

resolve_duplicates.validation: Requires at least 2 entry_ids and valid strategy

bulk_assign.notification: Creates royalty_update notification for assigned artist
